name: Cajun Stuffed Pistolettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the shrimp until translucent.
2. Saute onions, bell pepper, celery, and green onions in butter until translucent.
3. Add milk, Velveeta cheese, water, cooked shrimp, crabmeat, salt, black pepper, granulated garlic, and cayenne to the mixture and cook on low heat just until heated through.
4. Fry pistolettes (small football-shaped crusty rolls) in semi-deep fat until browned.
5. While still hot, hold them with a pot holder and make a slit at one end.
6. Stuff the pistolette with the seafood mixture.
7. Eat immediately.
